items.title: "The collaboration between C-Led and the experimental centre in Sant'Agata Bolognese began almost ten years ago: in recent years, there has been a continuous dialogue to support the lighting requirements of BASF|Nunhems researchers. Each new project has been defined in relation to the plant species of interest, the different phenological phases and the production objectives of each individual greenhouse,"
